metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.14-beta.18
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Adds a short volume ramp before Space/transport preview stops. - Extends Preview safety fade-in/out and writes seek position before playback. - Clears pending fade state on all Preview cleanup paths. - Makes the All Channels fill follow the actual selected-lane count.
